digest.component_or_area: LLM review gates observability sidecars and audit read layer
propositions: Plan-review and code-review sidecars currently drop pass-1 evidence/scenarios, non-surfaced finding buckets, and the resolved numeric block_threshold, so the audit record is incomplete.
A completion-verification PASS persists only signed counts, leaving no per-criterion audit record for successful closes.
New v2 sidecar schemas capture the full four-pass record across all buckets including pass-4 coaching and the resolved threshold, while readers accept both v1 and v2 for backward compatibility.
Review-sidecar retention is raised beyond the prior 10-per-ticket cap so a ticket's review history is deep enough to audit.
A documented read API (library, CLI 'rebar audit show', MCP audit_trail) returns full retained audit history and resolves associated code reviews via relates_to links.
Scope excludes any web UI, asymmetric-key signing, and changes to what is signed in the attestation manifest.
